questionHtml:
When sodium carbonate powder is added to ethanoic acid, the beaker becomes cooler.

Possible enthalpy diagrams are shown.

Which correctly describes the reaction?

meta.title: When sodium carbonate powder is added to ethanoic acid, the beaker becomes cooler. Possible enthalpy diagrams are shown. Which correctly describes the reaction?
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.1.3—The relative stability of reactants and products determines whether reactions are endothermic or exothermic. Sketch and interpret energy profiles for endothermic and exothermic reactions.
